final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for bubble tea in pink kawaii summer style for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) content.

Style/medium: flat illustration with soft gradients, pastel kawaii aesthetic, social media content design
Composition: centered product shot with negative space for text overlay, 3:4 vertical ratio
Subject: bubble tea in clear plastic cup with visible tapioca pearls, condensation droplets on cup surface, decorative straw
Scene/backdrop: minimal abstract pink gradient background with subtle bokeh light circles suggesting summer freshness
Lighting/mood: soft diffused daylight, bright and airy, cheerful and refreshing summer vibe
Color palette: dominant soft pink and blush tones, milky beige for tea, dark brown pearls as contrast accent, hints of mint or aqua for coolness
Materials/textures: glossy plastic cup surface, liquid transparency, chewy pearl texture, soft matte background
Constraints: must work as Xiaohongshu cover image with space for headline text overlay at top or bottom
Avoid: photorealistic photography style, harsh shadows, cluttered backgrounds, generic stock photo look, 8K stuffer words
